name: Lobster Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions for 2 minutes in butter, add salt and pepper.
2. Break up lobster meat into small chunks and mix with onions. Let sit.
3. Beat eggs and mix in tomato paste.
4. Scald cream, then add nutmeg. Pour over the eggs.
5. Add wine and cheese to the mixture.
6. Bake pastry shell at 400°F for 8 minutes.
7. Arrange lobster meat on the shell and pour cream mixture over it.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 30-40 minutes or until filling is set as desired.
